name: murzaktech-workspace
description: Murzak Technologies root workspace to orchestrate frontend and backend development and testing.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:qa: npm run test:qa-live --prefix backend && npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend -- e2e/qa-*.spec.ts
